---
id: list-what-to-test-descriptions
title: "Get a list of 'What to test' descriptions - IOS only"
description: "Gives back a list of 'What to test' descriptions and the default locale."
sidebar_label: "Get a list of 'What to test' descriptions - IOS only"
hide_title: true

api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: en/release-management-api/store-releases/api-reference/release-management-api-app-versions
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a list of 'What to test' descriptions - IOS only"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/app-versions/{id}/beta-distribution/what-to-test"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gives back a list of "What to test" descriptions and the default locale.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
